executives.name: Richard Homsany
executives.background: Mr Homsany is an experienced corporate lawyer and has over 30 years’ experience in the resources sector. He is the Executive Chairman of Toro Energy Limited and also serves as the Chairman of Healthia Limited and Galan Lithium Limited. He has extensive experience in corporate law, finance, and management within the mining industry.

executives.name: Katherine Irelan
executives.background: Ms Irelan is a Chartered Accountant with over 20 years of experience in the resource sector, specializing in financial management, corporate governance, and statutory reporting. She has held various senior financial roles in ASX-listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Homsany
board_of_directors.background: Mr Homsany is an experienced corporate lawyer and has over 30 years’ experience in the resources sector. He is the Executive Chairman of Toro Energy Limited and also serves as the Chairman of Healthia Limited and Galan Lithium Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Patricio
board_of_directors.background: Mr Patricio is a lawyer and the President and CEO of Mega Uranium Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in the mining sector, specifically in uranium. He serves on the boards of several publicly listed companies including NexGen Energy Ltd and ISOEnergy Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Michel Marier
board_of_directors.background: Mr Marier is a co-founder and partner of Integrated Asset Management (IAM). He has extensive experience in private equity and infrastructure investments. He previously held senior positions at Sentient Asset Management Canada.

sources.source_description: Official Company Website - Board and Management Page
